MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff James F. Blanding present in pro per.
Shirley M. Huang, Esq., representing the defendant Farajia A. Kamau through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case settled, parties entered into a signed agreement, which was filed.
Trial date vacated.
